title: Your Kubernetes cluster is running — but is it healthy?
snippet: Many teams only discover problems when users start complaining. Prometheus + Grafana + AlertManager gives full visibility into cluster health before issues reach production.

title: A bad Dockerfile can create security risks and very large container images
snippet: My 8-point Dockerfile checklist — from pinning base image versions and multi-stage builds to never running containers as root and always scanning for vulnerabilities.

title: How to prepare for a DevOps interview in 30 days
snippet: No expensive courses. No unnecessary theory. Week by week plan covering Linux, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and cloud architecture.

title: Ansible vs Terraform — they are not competitors, they work best together
snippet: Terraform builds the house. Ansible furnishes it. In real production: Terraform creates infrastructure, Ansible configures servers, applications deploy on top.

title: I built a Netflix Clone DevSecOps pipeline on AWS — not a tutorial demo
snippet: A real project with real problems: Jenkins, Docker, EKS, ArgoCD, Prometheus, Grafana, SonarQube and Trivy. Lessons learned building production-style pipelines.

title: Your CI/CD pipeline may have a hidden security problem
snippet: Many engineers only discover it after credentials get leaked. Cloud credentials stored inside configuration files is one of the most dangerous mistakes in DevSecOps.
